crossContactClaims.claim: Some pasta is cooked in a shared pot, posing a risk of cross contact with egg allergens; seafood and gluten-free pastas are cooked separately.
Deep fried items are fried in a shared fryer; guests with allergies are not recommended to order fried foods.
